title: CobbleStructures
description: A datapack that adds structures such as the pokecenter and pokemart to your cobblemon world.
body:
# Cobble Structures – A Structure Datapack for Cobblemon

This datapack adds new, vanilla-like pokemon structures designed to fit into your Cobblemon World. Currently only contains PokeMarts and PokeCenters but i'm aiming to add new structures and pokemarts/centers hybrids. For questions or requests whether negative or positive please dm me on discord at **Irikimust**.

### Features
- Naturally Generated Custom PokeMarts w/Cobbledollar compatibility
- Naturally Generated Custom PokeCenters 

### Required/Recommended
For the best experience you will need:

- **[Cobblemon 1.6.1 or above](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)**
- **[Another Furniture 4.0.0 or above](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)**
- **[Cobbledollars 2.0.0 or above](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledollars)**
- [Cobblemon Pokenav 2.2.2 or above](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav)
- [Cobblemon Repel 1.6-1.2 or above](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-repel)
- [SimpleTMs 2.1.2 or above](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon)
- [Waystones 21.5.7 or above](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)


Installation:
Drop the .zip into your world’s /datapacks/ folder. Works in both singleplayer and servers.
